title: Live updates: The latest on the 2026 Boston Marathon
author: Ross Cristantiello
bullets: Boston Marathon Follow up-to-date reports on the 130th Boston Marathon, as more than 30,000 people race from Hopkinton to Boston.
Runners arrive at the Athletes’ Village to prepare for the Boston Marathon on Monday, April 20, 2026.
Craig F.

title: Bruins’ talk of punishing hockey rings hollow amid ugly Game 1 collapse in Buffalo
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: Boston Bruins “Everyone's going to say you can't really lose a series in Game 1.
But we put ourselves behind the eight ball.
” Marco Sturm and the Bruins let a two-goal lead slip through their grasp in the third period on Sunday.

title: Yes, Chef: When this Bar Volpe chef isn’t running, she’s eating at these Boston spots
author: Katelyn Umholtz
bullets: Restaurants Molly Dwyer heads to Somerville for Greater Boston's best croissants, while the perfect dish is located in the Seaport.
Michette danishes on croissant dough.
Josh Reynolds for The Boston Globe ShareSend this article to your social connections.

title: McCourty twins give their take on what Patriots should target in NFL Draft
author: Conor Ryan
bullets: New England Patriots "It’s very hard if it’s just Milton [Williams] and [Christian] Barmore in the middle.
" Devin and Jason McCourty both think the Patriots need to bolster their pass-rushing corps.
AP Photo/Elise Amendola, File The 2026 NFL Draft is just a few days away, and the Patriots still have several holes to fill across their roster at this stage of the offseason.

title: This Waltham man is running Boston for Big Brothers Big Sisters
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Boston Marathon "As an only child who could have used a big brother growing up, I am fully committed to this organization and everything it stands for," Gladden said.
Aaron Gladden is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.
Aaron Gladden In our “Why I’m Running” series, Boston Marathon athletes share what’s inspiring them to make the 26.

B.

title: Celtics crowd trolls 76ers fans with ‘We want Boston’ chants during blowout win
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics 76ers fans said they wanted Boston.
Celtics fans mocked them loudly.

Jaylen Brown dunks a basketball at TD Garden Photo by: Barry Chin/Globe Staff ‘ During the closing minutes of the 76ers play-in game victory against Orlando that set up this series against the Celtics, fans at Philadelphia’s Xfinity Mobile Arena started a “We want Boston” chant.

title: Attleboro man sentenced after child porn conviction
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Local News "The defendant has demonstrated that he has a disturbed and disordered mind by disseminating hundreds of nude photos of children.
The sentence is warranted," Quinn said.
An Attleboro man was sentenced to up to five years in prison for possessing thousands of files of child pornography, prosecutors said.

title: Jayson Tatum, Celtics look ready for what’s ahead in Game 1 blowout over Sixers: 7 takeaways
author: Tom Westerholm
bullets: Boston Celtics As the seconds wound down on the Celtics’ blowout win, fans serenaded the players with a chant of “We want Boston!
We want Boston!
" in a jab at Sixers fans.

title: Nike removes ‘walkers tolerated’ ad from Newbury Street store after blowback
author: Molly Farrar
bullets: Boston Marathon The sign that read in large block letters “Runners welcome.
Walkers tolerated," was taken down just days before the Boston Marathon.
Shoppers entering the NIKE store in Somerville.
